upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yo nilAyaM carati yaH prataNkam' (aTarva0 4162) prataNkam prakarzeRa kfcCrajIvanaM prApyeti sAyaRaH prataNkamiti Ramulantam sAyaRaBAzite'rTe'ruci rnaH na hyevaM kiYcitsaMgatArTamuktaM Bavati nilAyamityasya viroDitayA prakASaM prasaBaM vetyarTaH syAt bAQaM DAtvarTastvimamarTaM nAnugfhRAti
